languages.text: "Достаточно. Я услышал достаточно". {n}Из вокс-решетки Себериана вырывается разочарованная трель.{/n} "Взгляните на себя. Весь этот "совет" — фарс, презренная профанация, которая заставляет меня тратить драгоценное время. Моя свита не в состоянии прийти к единому мнению. Советники! Отступайте во дворец. Я сражу предателя сам".
languages.translation_comment:
DL_LariaPlan_counter ≤3, и DL_Treason_counter ≤3
Либо DL_LariaPlan_counter = DL_Treason_counter
Стартует DL_SeberianDecision

traits.locale_text: "Достаточно. Я услышал достаточно". {n}Рослая фигура Себериана нависает над вами.{/n} "Видите, {name}. Весь этот "совет" — фарс, презренная профанация, которая лишь заставляет меня тратить драгоценные секунды. Моя свита не в состоянии прийти к единому мнению. Все вы! Отступайте во дворец. Здесь я справлюсь сам".

languages.translation_comment:
DL_LariaPlan_counter ≤3, и DL_Treason_counter ≤3
Либо DL_LariaPlan_counter = DL_Treason_counter
Стартует DL_SeberianDecision

languages.text: "Enough. I have heard enough." {n}A frustrated trill erupts from Seberian's vox-grille.{/n} "Look at yourselves. This entire 'council' is a farce, a despicable sham that has forced me to waste precious time. My retinue is incapable of finding a consensus. Counsellors! Retreat to the palace. I will dispatch the traitor myself."
languages.original_text: "Достаточно. Я услышал достаточно". {n}Из вокс-решетки Себериана вырывается разочарованная трель.{/n} "Взгляните на себя. Весь этот "совет" — фарс, презренная профанация, которая заставляет меня тратить драгоценное время. Моя свита не в состоянии прийти к единому мнению. Советники! Отступайте во дворец. Я сражу предателя сам".

This entire 'council' is a farce, a despicable sham that has forced me to waste precious time. My retinue is incapable of finding a consensus. Counsellors! Retreat to the palace. I will dispatch the traitor myself."

This entire 'council' is a farce, a despicable sham that has forced me to waste precious time. My retinue is incapable of finding a consensus. Counsellors! Retreat to the palace. I will dispatch the traitor myself."

"Enough. I have heard enough." {n}A frustrated trill erupts from Seberian's vox-grille.{/n} "Look at yourselves. This entire 'council' is a farce, a despicable sham that has forced me to waste precious time. My retinue is incapable of finding a consensus. Counsellors! Retreat to the palace. I will dispatch the traitor myself."

languages.text: “够了，不必再说了。”{n}塞贝里安的音阵格栅发出一阵沮丧的颤音。{/n}“看看你们自己。这所谓的议会，不过是一场可悲的闹剧，浪费了我宝贵的时间。我的随从们连最基本的共识都无法达成。顾问们！退回宫殿。我将亲自解决那个叛徒。”
languages.original_text: "Enough. I have heard enough." {n}A frustrated trill erupts from Seberian's vox-grille.{/n} "Look at yourselves. This entire 'council' is a farce, a despicable sham that has forced me to waste precious time. My retinue is incapable of finding a consensus. Counsellors! Retreat to the palace. I will dispatch the traitor myself."

traits.locale_text: “够了，不必再说了。”{n}塞贝里安的音阵格栅发出一阵沮丧的颤音。{/n}“看看你们自己。这所谓的议会，不过是一场可悲的闹剧，浪费了我宝贵的时间。我的随从们连最基本的共识都无法达成。顾问们！退回宫殿。我将亲自解决那个叛徒。”

languages.text: « Ça suffit. J'en ai assez entendu. » {n}La grille-vox de Seberian émet un puissant trille de frustration.{/n} « Regardez-vous. Ce "conseil" n'est qu'une vaste blague, une imposture méprisable qui m'a fait perdre un temps précieux. Ma suite est incapable de se mettre d'accord. Conseillers ! Retirez-vous dans le palais. Je vais m'occuper du traître moi-même. »
languages.original_text: "Enough. I have heard enough." {n}A frustrated trill erupts from Seberian's vox-grille.{/n} "Look at yourselves. This entire 'council' is a farce, a despicable sham that has forced me to waste precious time. My retinue is incapable of finding a consensus. Counsellors! Retreat to the palace. I will dispatch the traitor myself."

traits.locale_text: « Ça suffit. J'en ai assez entendu. » {n}La grille-vox de Seberian émet un puissant trille de frustration.{/n} « Regardez-vous. Ce "conseil" n'est qu'une vaste blague, une imposture méprisable qui m'a fait perdre un temps précieux. Ma suite est incapable de se mettre d'accord. Conseillers ! Retirez-vous dans le palais. Je vais m'occuper du traître moi-même. »

languages.text: «Basta. Ya he oído bastante». {n}Un trino frustrado brota de la rejilla de voco de Seberian.{/n} «Mirense. Este "consejo" es una farsa, una vulgar moda que me ha arrebatado mi valioso tiempo. Mi séquito es incapaz de llegar a un consenso. ¡Asesores! Retírense a palacio. Me ocuparé personalmente del traidor».
languages.original_text: "Enough. I have heard enough." {n}A frustrated trill erupts from Seberian's vox-grille.{/n} "Look at yourselves. This entire 'council' is a farce, a despicable sham that has forced me to waste precious time. My retinue is incapable of finding a consensus. Counsellors! Retreat to the palace. I will dispatch the traitor myself."

traits.locale_text: «Basta. Ya he oído bastante». {n}Un trino frustrado brota de la rejilla de voco de Seberian.{/n} «Mirense. Este "consejo" es una farsa, una vulgar moda que me ha arrebatado mi valioso tiempo. Mi séquito es incapaz de llegar a un consenso. ¡Asesores! Retírense a palacio. Me ocuparé personalmente del traidor».

languages.text: "Tamam. Yeterince duydum." {n}Seberian'ın voks ızgarasından hayal kırıklığıyla dolu bir ses çıkıyor.{/n} "Kendinize bir bakın. Bu konseyde konuşulanlar bütünüyle saçmalık. Değerli vaktimi boşa harcamama neden olan iğrenç bir aldatmaca bu. Maiyetim, fikir birliğine ulaşmaktan âciz. Danışmanlar! Saraya çekilin. Hainin icabına bizzat ben bakacağım."
languages.original_text: "Enough. I have heard enough." {n}A frustrated trill erupts from Seberian's vox-grille.{/n} "Look at yourselves. This entire 'council' is a farce, a despicable sham that has forced me to waste precious time. My retinue is incapable of finding a consensus. Counsellors! Retreat to the palace. I will dispatch the traitor myself."

traits.locale_text: "Tamam. Yeterince duydum." {n}Seberian'ın voks ızgarasından hayal kırıklığıyla dolu bir ses çıkıyor.{/n} "Kendinize bir bakın. Bu konseyde konuşulanlar bütünüyle saçmalık. Değerli vaktimi boşa harcamama neden olan iğrenç bir aldatmaca bu. Maiyetim, fikir birliğine ulaşmaktan âciz. Danışmanlar! Saraya çekilin. Hainin icabına bizzat ben bakacağım."

languages.text: "Schluss jetzt. Ich habe genug gehört." {n}Ein frustriertes Trillern ertönt aus Seberians Vox-Gitter.{/n} "Seht Euch an. Dieser ganze 'Rat' ist eine Farce, eine abscheuliche Schwindelei, die mich gezwungen hat, wertvolle Zeit zu vergeuden. Mein Gefolge ist nicht in der Lage, einen Konsens zu finden. Ratgeber! Zieht Euch zum Palast zurück. Ich kümmere mich selbst um den Verräter!"
languages.original_text: "Enough. I have heard enough." {n}A frustrated trill erupts from Seberian's vox-grille.{/n} "Look at yourselves. This entire 'council' is a farce, a despicable sham that has forced me to waste precious time. My retinue is incapable of finding a consensus. Counsellors! Retreat to the palace. I will dispatch the traitor myself."

traits.locale_text: "Schluss jetzt. Ich habe genug gehört." {n}Ein frustriertes Trillern ertönt aus Seberians Vox-Gitter.{/n} "Seht Euch an. Dieser ganze 'Rat' ist eine Farce, eine abscheuliche Schwindelei, die mich gezwungen hat, wertvolle Zeit zu vergeuden. Mein Gefolge ist nicht in der Lage, einen Konsens zu finden. Ratgeber! Zieht Euch zum Palast zurück. Ich kümmere mich selbst um den Verräter!"

languages.text: 「もう十分だ。私はもう十分聞いた。」{n}シベリアンのヴォックス・グリルから、不満の溜まりに溢れた音色が溢れ出す。{/n}「己自身を見てください。この『評議会』全体は、虚偽であり、卑劣な偽物です。貴重な時間を無駄にさせました。私の側近は合意に達することができません。評議員たち！宮殿に退却せよ。私は裏切り者を自分で処刑する。」
languages.original_text: "Enough. I have heard enough." {n}A frustrated trill erupts from Seberian's vox-grille.{/n} "Look at yourselves. This entire 'council' is a farce, a despicable sham that has forced me to waste precious time. My retinue is incapable of finding a consensus. Counsellors! Retreat to the palace. I will dispatch the traitor myself."

traits.locale_text: 「もう十分だ。私はもう十分聞いた。」{n}シベリアンのヴォックス・グリルから、不満の溜まりに溢れた音色が溢れ出す。{/n}「己自身を見てください。この『評議会』全体は、虚偽であり、卑劣な偽物です。貴重な時間を無駄にさせました。私の側近は合意に達することができません。評議員たち！宮殿に退却せよ。私は裏切り者を自分で処刑する。」
